query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A multi-story brick building photographed at night with a streetlamp in the foreground illuminating the center of the facade. The structure features rectangular windows, some with air conditioning units, and arched doorways and openings at ground level. A strip of snow rests along the curb of the empty street in front. Deep blue sky is visible in the upper left, and faded painted signage is partially visible on the right side of the wall.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A multi-story brick building photographed at night with extreme underexposure that crushes the upper floors and right portion of the facade into near-total darkness. A single streetlamp illuminates the center of the structure, revealing rectangular windows, arched ground-floor openings, and faded painted signage on the wall. Snow lines the curb of the empty street, while the heavy shadows and isolated setting create an oppressive, uneasy atmosphere.
